channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: MWC 2026 day 1: the 8 best gadgets we've seen today, from super-slim foldables to high-end wireless earbuds
item.description: It's the biggest mobile tech event of the year, and the TechRadar team is busy checking out everything that's noteworthy.

item.title: Starlink's next-gen satellite network could provide 150 Mbps speeds by end of next year
item.description: Starlink is getting ready to launch its second generation of satellites, and it's expected to match the speeds of a traditional terrestrial network. During a keynote at Mobile World Congress, Starlink execs detailed the roadmap for the company's upgrade towards the next generation of satellites called V2. "The goal of Starlink Mobile ... is to provide a terrestrial-like connectivity when you're connected to the satellite system," Michael Nicolls, SpaceX's senior vice president of Starlink engineering, said during the MWC keynote. "In the right conditions, it should look and feel like you're co...

item.title: Never get lost again, as this startup can give you 5G tracking even without GPS - right down to the centimeter
item.description: ZaiNar claims it can turn standard 5G signals into centimeter level positioning without GPS, new hardware, or handset manufacturer cooperation.

item.title: ‘Draft Barron Trump’ website and memes tap into a very real anxiety in the wake of U.S. military action in Iran
item.description: As conflict escalates in the Middle East, Google searches for “military draft” are on the rise. Over the weekend, a new website popped up that opens with a striking manifesto: “America is strong because its leaders are strong. President Trump proves that every day. Naturally, his son Barron is more than ready to defend the country his father so boldly commands.” ...

item.title: Le mystère des « toiles d'araignée » sur Mars est levé, et leur emplacement relance la question de l'habitabilité
item.description: Repérées depuis l’orbite il y a près de 20 ans, ces étranges « toiles d’araignée » martiennes ont longtemps défié les explications. Après 13 années de route, Curiosity les a enfin examinées de près, et ce qu’il a découvert pourrait bouleverser notre vision du passé climatique de la Planète...

item.title: Switching to Anthropic? Claude can now take your memories from ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot
item.description: The app surged in downloads after Trump blacklisted it from the government. Here’s how new users can import old chats from other services. Anthropic has announced a new “memory” tool that allows Claude users to copy over their chats from other AI chatbots, giving those who want to switch over from ChatGPT, Gemini, and Copilot an easy way.

item.title: Ease Your ‘A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms’ Withdrawals With This Adorable Blooper Reel
item.description: The HBO 'Game of Thrones' spin-off also has a physical release with even more extras coming in June.

item.title: Hands-on with the Xiaomi 17 Ultra: three upgrades I love and two things I wish it had
item.description: The Xiaomi 17 Ultra boasts a refined design, an impressive camera with a 1-inch sensor and a variable telephoto zoom, plus a huge battery.

item.title: Prise de conscience écologique croissante | Explosion de la demande pour les téléphones intelligents d’occasion
item.description: En quelques années, le marché des téléphones d’occasion a explosé, porté par des prix bien plus attrayant que ceux des appareils neufs et une prise de conscience écologique croissante qui incite les consommateurs à se tourner vers des solutions plus durables. Malgré des doutes persistants sur la qualité des produits.

item.title: Avis aux gamers fauchés : ce moniteur Full HD de 27″ rafraîchi à 144 Hz coûte moins de 100 €
item.description: Idéal pour la bureautique ou des sessions gaming, l'écran PC MSI PRO MP273W E14A est un modèle particulièrement fluide, mais surtout très peu cher. Actuellement, PC Componentes le propose en effet à 98,18 euros.

item.title: You could be an influencer without even realizing it
item.description: In late February, Puck reported on a strange case: An influencer with more than a million followers was inadvertently promoting products on Instagram. On some of Julia Berolzheimer's posts, a "Shop the look" button hovered in the corner. When followers clicked it, they were fed similar items to what Berolzheimer was wearing. Her job is […]

item.title: Users are ditching ChatGPT for Claude. Here’s how to make the switch
item.description: Following controversies surrounding ChatGPT, many users are ditching the AI chatbot for Claude instead. Here's how to make the switch.

item.title: X adds ‘Paid Partnership’ labels so users can more easily identify ads
item.description: X is rolling out a built-in “Paid Partnership” label that creators can apply to sponsored posts, replacing the hashtag workarounds they’ve had to rely on until now. The feature, announced by the platform’s head of product Nikita Bier, adds a toggle that places a disclosure label directly below a post’s content. It can also be applied retroactively. The label is meant to help creators comply with years-old FTC regulations requiring clear disclosure of sponsored content. The agency sent out letters reminding influencers about this requirement in 2017, and Instagram added a disclosure feature tha...

item.title: The Ninja Foodi PossibleCooker is 'an excellent value multicooker' — and it's crashed to a record-low price on Amazon
item.description: Here's your chance to bag a gob-smacking record-low price for the 4.5-star-rated multicooker from Ninja that was one of our favourite kitchen gadgets from last year.

item.title: Attacks on GPS Spike Amid US and Israeli War on Iran
item.description: New analysis shows that attacks on satellite navigation systems have impacted some 1,100 ships in the Middle East since the US and Israel attacked Iran on February 28.

item.title: Paramount+ and HBO Max to merge into one streaming service after WBD deal closes
item.description: If the Warner Bros. Discovery deal were to close, Paramount CEO David Ellison revealed that Paramount+ and HBO Max would combine into one platform.

item.title: iPad Air M4 vs. iPad Air M3: The few new things in Apple's midrange tablet
item.description: The iPad Air, the middle child in Apple’s tablet lineup, has been upgraded to the M4 chip with increased RAM and… Well, there’s not a whole lot else if I’m being honest. At the very least, the new iPad Air M4 models remain at the same price as the iPad Air M3, with the 11-inch version starting at $599 and the 13-inch at $799. I would give Apple more credit if it had increased the starting storage or added literally anything else.If you put them side by side, you might not be able to tell the difference, but this upgrade would benefit creatives and professionals more than anything. There’s a si...

item.title: Our Favorite Budget TV Is On Sale
item.description: This 55-inch Vizion isn't the fanciest, but you could do a lot worse for under $300.

item.title: Adapting to change is the most critical professional skill today
item.description: Employees with high learning agility are promoted more and receive higher salary increases than their low-agility peers. Below, Liz Tran shares five key insights from her new book, AQ: A New Kind of Intelligence for a World That’s Always Changing.

item.title: Bitcoin price is rising again in a sharp market reversal. Why the Middle East crisis has investors turning to crypto
item.description: After tumbling in the wake of Saturday’s attack on Iran, major cryptocurrencies and related stocks are on the upswing again. Here’s what could be happening. Forward March? The initial market movements on Monday seem to indicate that’s the case, at least for crypto.

item.title: The Analogue Pocket will be back in stock this week, but there's a tariff-related price increase
item.description: The Analogue Pocket handheld retro console has proven to be extremely popular, as initial runs have sold out. The company just announced the system will be back in stock this week, along with the dock accessory. Preorders open up on March 4 at 11AM ET, with shipments going out this June. Analogue Pocket & Analogue Dock - restock.A tribute to portable gaming. Out of the box, Pocket is compatible with the 2,780+ Game Boy, Game Boy Color & Game Boy Advance game cartridge library and more. Available March 4th, 8am PST. Ships June 2026. pic.twitter.com/8XZ3fbh87a— Analogue (@analogue) March 2, 2026...

item.title: Microsoft HoloLens is arming the soldier of the future – but not in the way you might think
item.description: The US Air Force can now turn any enlisted man into a cargo balancing expert with the help of Microsoft's HoloLens.

item.title: Apple Declares It’s Keeping Prices the Same Despite the RAM Apocalypse
item.description: The iPhone 17e and iPad Air with M4 cost the same as last year. Somehow, that’s a victory.

item.title: Motorola Razr Fold officially joins the foldable party with new specs and details
item.description: Motorola is finally dropping official details about its Razr Fold foldable smartphone.

item.title: Lenovo just showed me the future of laptops at MWC 2026 — and it didn't mention AI once
item.description: At MWC 2026 it seems everyone is talking about AI... except Lenovo, and I couldn't be happier.

item.title: ‘Scream 7’ Broke Franchise Box Office Records Despite Franchise-Worst Reviews
item.description: The return of Ghostface slashed up the box office with almost $100 million globally.

item.title: Donut Lab’s solid-state battery can handle the (extreme) heat, test says
item.description: Finnish startup Donut Lab is out to prove that its solid-state battery is all that it claims to be. Last week, the test was about fast charging. This week is where things get hot. Like the first test, this one was also conducted by state-owned VTT Technical Research Centre of Finland. The team set out […]

item.title: I love my foldable phone and PC handhelds, but I don’t see the appeal of this goofy Lenovo concept
item.description: The Lenovo Legion Go Fold is an iPad crossed with a foldable PC crossed with a Nintendo Switch, and somehow I don't love it

item.title: AI can make actors immortal—but not everyone wants to become IP
item.description: The prospect of digital resurrection of actors isn’t just looming for A-listers. Actors across the board are signing contracts that could keep their likeness acting even after they die. No one wants to be in a bad movie—but imagine a movie studio casting you in new movies after you die, without your consent. That may have once seemed something out of a Black Mirror episode, but it’s becoming a real issue, and many think current legal protections don’t go nearly far enough....

item.title: McDonald’s CEO awkwardly samples his company’s new burger in viral video
item.description: The social media post meant to be promotional, but it’s turned into a PR fiasco. With nearly 40,000 locations in over 100 countries, tens of millions of people worldwide regularly eat McDonald’s iconic burgers. But in an Instagram post that’s blowing up the internet, company CEO Chris Kempczinski appears less-than-thrilled to be eating one himself.

item.title: Le top 3 de nos smartphones préférés en mars 2026
item.description: Pendant que le MWC se tient à Barcelone, nous en profitons pour faire un petit bilan de ce mois passé. Quels ont été les smartphones favoris parmi ceux qui sont passés entre nos mains ?

item.title: AI-generated art can’t be copyrighted after Supreme Court declines to review the rule
item.description: The US Supreme Court has declined to hear a case over whether AI-generated art can obtain a copyright, as reported earlier by Reuters. The Monday decision comes after Stephen Thaler, a computer scientist from Missouri, appealed a court's decision to uphold a ruling that found AI-generated art can't be copyrighted. In 2019, the US Copyright […]

item.title: How to watch Handcuffed on Channel 4 — it's *FREE*
item.description: What if the biggest secret of your life was written into your DNA… and got it wrong? Our guide explains how to watch Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing online now and free from anywhere.

item.title: Our favorite budget projector maker has a smart new portable model that folds away into a simple 'ornament' when not in use
item.description: Xgimi's new portable projector hides itself away to take up less shelf or bag space

item.title: Anthropic gets so much public support after Trump blacklisting that it crashes the Claude app
item.description: The AI company gained a new legion of fans by opposing the Pentagon using its tech for mass domestic surveillance and fully autonomous weapons. Anthropic may have lost a fan in Donald Trump, but it seems to have gained plenty of new ones after refusing to make a deal with the United States government, citing ethics concerns.

item.title: The Apple AirPods Pro 3 are under $160, if you can live with open box
item.description: The Apple AirPods Pro 3 are $154.99 at Best Buy, for an open-box model in excellent condition. Brand new, the same earbuds cost $249 at full price, saving you $94.01.
